normalized_claims.escalation_requirement: Human escalation is mandatory to reconcile conflicting onsite assertions and authorize recovery action; no automated resolution is permissible per RISK-001 mitigation directive.
normalized_claims.milestone_slip_exposure: Contractual milestone MS-COMMISSIONING-READY is forecast to slip 13 days (SCH-DELIVERY-001), directly driven by the 21-day delivery shift; installation float (8 days) is insufficient to absorb the delay without intervention.
normalized_claims.onsite_status_conflict: High-severity conflict exists: progress report (PRG-ONSITE-001) claims EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released, but supplier correspondence (SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001) and carrier logistics (LOG-STATUS-001) confirm it remains in transit with forecast arrival 2026-07-22.
normalized_claims.recovery_approval_risk: Approved recovery option REC-ACCEL-LOGISTICS is available subject to project approval (RISK-001), but human confirmation of actual onsite status is required before authorization — unresolved conflict blocks final approval.

raw_claims.escalation_requirement: Human escalation is mandatory to reconcile conflicting onsite assertions and authorize recovery action; no automated resolution is permissible per RISK-001 mitigation directive.

normalized_claims.delay_exposure_usd_per_day_support: Supported: COST-SUMMARY-001 and CTR-DELAY-001 both state delay_exposure_usd_per_day = 15000.
normalized_claims.equipment_onsite_claim_conflict: Contradiction confirmed: PRG-ONSITE-001 asserts EQ-GEN-SKID-01 is onsite and released; SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001, LOG-STATUS-001, and RISK-001 uniformly confirm it has not arrived and remains in transit with forecast arrival 2026-07-22.
normalized_claims.installation_total_float_consumed_days_s: Supported: SCH-DELIVERY-001 states installation_total_float_days = 8, and ScheduleExpert validation confirms full consumption (remaining = 0).
